_meta.source: Herrmann SD, Willis EA, Ainsworth BE, et al. 2024 Adult Compendium of Physical Activities. J Sport Health Sci. 2024;13(1):6-12. DOI: 10.1016/j.jshs.2023.10.010
_meta.note: Full 1,114-activity population from 2024 Adult Compendium of Physical Activities. All MET values verified against pacompendium.com.
